title: Wesk Herf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Veed-tattoo.jpg|thumb|Veed's tattoo of Wesk Herf]]
The two glyphs '''Wesk Herf''' (the letters '''W. H.''' in the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]]) represented the name of a spaceship, apparently a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Fel Empire]].

This was the first vessel that future [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Morlish Veed]] served aboard at the start of his spacefaring career. As a result, he wore a [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] with the two letters on his right bicep, one above the other.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Moff Veed's tattoo appears in the preview for [[Legacy (2006) 16|issue #16]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' comic at the [[Dark Horse Comics]] website.<ref name="Preview">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/Previews/14-438?page=1|text=Legacy 16 preview}}</ref> ''Legacy'' artist [[Jan Duursema]] subsequently explained the meaning of the glyphs in a discussion thread at [[TheForce.net]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/27354762|board=Literature|thread=Legacy #16: Claws of the Dragon, part 3 (of 6)|user=Jan_Duursema|date=2007-08-23|time=4:26 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801201830/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/legacy-16-claws-of-the-dragon-part-3-of-6.26902076/page-7}}</ref>
